title: Opening for Hotel Manager at ITC Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at ITC Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Ludhiana team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
